data.title: BTC climbs to $78K, eyeing $80K resistance amidst institutional inflows and spot demand surge.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has experienced a significant upswing, reaching $78,000 and successfully regaining crucial positions within the market. This surge has been attributed to the increasing inflow of institutional investment in ETFs, along with a rise in demand for spot trading. However, as Bitcoin approaches the $80,000 mark, it faces a potential resistance level that could impact its further growth.

data.title: Gemini Embedding 2 by Google now accessible, allows developers to add multimodal intelligence through API and Vertex AI.
data.description: Gemini Embedding 2 by Google has been officially launched for developers, allowing them to incorporate multimodal intelligence into their products through API and Vertex AI. This latest release aims at enhancing the overall user experience by utilizing advanced technologies.

data.title: Anyscale introduces Agent Skills to bolster AI on Ray, improving Claude Code and Cursor for faster, scalable workflows.
data.description: Anyscale introduces Agent Skills, boosting AI coding tools like Claude Code and Cursor, improving Ray-based workflows for increased speed and scalability. The enhanced tools promise a more efficient coding experience for developers seeking improved productivity.

Swiss National Bank says losses on foreign currency holdings totaled CHF 8.2 billion

data.title: FMCG Market to Reach $18,939.4 Billion by 2031 at 5.1% CAGR - Allied Market Research
data.description: The global fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) market is expected to experience significant growth through 2031, driven by factors such as increasing disposable incomes, expansion of e-commerce platforms, and evolving consumer lifestyles. A recent report by Allied Market Research forecasts a robust market expansion, with key trends projected to shape the industry in the coming years. This growth is anticipated to be propelled by a variety of factors, with key insights indicating a promising outlook for the industry. For more information, refer to the report "FMCG Market by..." released on April 23, 2026 from Wilmington, Delaware.

data.title: ETH trader activity surges 72% amid liquidity gap at $2.6K. Buyers dominate derivatives, eyeing $2,500-$2,600 rally.
data.description: Trading data indicates that Ethereum derivatives are currently seeing a significant influx of buyers, suggesting a strong buyer dominance in the market. This trend has caught the attention of traders who are now setting their sights on a crucial rally in the range of $2,500 to $2,600 for Ethereum.

data.title: GSR introduces Crypto Core3 ETF, tracking Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana, the top three cryptocurrencies by market cap.
data.description: GSR has recently launched their inaugural crypto exchange-traded product, known as the GSR Crypto Core3 ETF. This ETF provides investors with the opportunity to invest in the three largest cryptocurrencies based on market capitalization.

data.title: NY, IL issue Executive Orders banning state workers from prediction markets. Gov. Hochul criticizes lack of ethical standards in this area.
data.description: Governor Kathy Hochul of New York has expressed criticism towards the lack of "meaningful ethical standards" by the Trump administration in addressing insider trading within prediction markets.Hochul highlighted the absence of effective measures to prevent such activities, which have raised concerns.

data.title: Palantir and AIP Specialist Firm, Vanyar, Launches
data.description: Vanyar, a company launched today by enterprise technology experts, aims to bridge the gap between implementing platforms such as Palantir and achieving tangible operational results. The company, based in Sydney and founded by industry leaders, focuses on Palantir Foundry and AIP. This specialized firm is dedicated to providing solutions for leveraging these platforms effectively.
